summary: Backend testing for major server.py cleanup - preferences router migration. All 20 new tests passed + 29 regression tests passed (49 total). Server.py reduced from 7538 to 1128 lines (85% reduction). Fixed missing import bug.

minor.issue: hide_watermark allows 'trialing' status users to set true - behavior may be intentional since watermark display is handled separately by should_show_watermark()

passed_tests: TestAuthEndpointsViaRouter::test_login_endpoint_works - PASS: Login works via auth router
TestCoreFeatures::test_get_entities_endpoint - PASS: Returns entities with trust_id param

preferences_router_verified.GET /api/notifications/preferences: WORKING - Returns all notification preferences with defaults
preferences_router_verified.PUT /api/user/preferences: WORKING - Updates preferences (allows trialing for hide_watermark)

core_features_verified: GET /api/entities?trust_id= - Works with auth (requires trust_id param)
dashboard_verified: GET /api/dashboard - Returns health_score, trust info, stats

bug_fixed.description: Missing import for get_or_create_units_settings in server.py
bug_fixed.fix: Added get_or_create_units_settings to import from routers.trust_units
bug_fixed.impact: Would have caused NameError for paid users accessing beneficiary dashboard

critical_code_review_comments: Server.py now at 1128 lines (85% reduction from 7538) - major cleanup successful
Preferences router properly handles notification preferences and user preferences
All models/enums correctly imported from models.py
All helper functions correctly imported from dependencies.py
Fixed missing get_or_create_units_settings import - would have caused runtime error for paid users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major server.py cleanup verified. 14 routers migrated. Preferences router (notifications, user preferences) tested and working. Auth router tested. Feature gates working. Fixed missing import for get_or_create_units_settings. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_preferences_router_cleanup.py.
